summary: MANUTRIX Iteration 6 - Industrial Evolution Testing Complete. Backend: 30/31 tests passed (96.8%). Frontend: All new modules verified working. Fixed RBAC issue where tecnico could see NOVO ATIVO button.

minor.issue: Returns 500 due to LLM budget exceeded - expected behavior, not a code bug

new_features_verified.description: Full CRUD with movements tracking, attachments, status management
Score = severidade × criticidade. Auto-generates OS with calculated priority
CRUD for equipment problems/solutions with search
List users with role badges, create new users (admin only)
Export buttons on Ativos, OS, Estoque, Inspeções pages

critical_code_review_comments: AI Assistant budget exceeded - this is expected LLM API limit, not a code bug
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/App.js (RBAC fix for NOVO ATIVO button visibility)

success_rate.backend: 96.8% (30/31 tests passed - 1 failure due to LLM budget)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new industrial evolution features verified working: Sobressalentes (spare parts with movements), Anomalias (intelligent prioritization score = severidade × criticidade), Attachments system, Knowledge Base, Admin user management, Export Excel/PDF. RBAC tightened: only admin can create/edit/delete ativos. Fixed frontend RBAC issue where tecnico could see NOVO ATIVO button. AI Assistant returns 500 due to LLM budget exceeded - this is expected behavior. All P0 CRUD functionality from previous iterations still working.

fixes_applied.issue: NOVO ATIVO button was visible to tecnico users
fixes_applied.fix: Added user?.role === 'admin' check to conditionally render the button and edit/delete actions
